Product
Pricing
Log in
Get started
Stop spending time on expenses
Do more of the work that matters. Centralize your business spending for complete financial efficiency and balance the books effortlessly with Pleo.
Get Started
Explore
All of your expenses, covered
Issue Pleo’s smart company cards with individual spending limits. Your team can buy what they need, while we sort the paperwork automatically.
Real-time overview
Admins get the details they need on every purchase. Something doesn’t look right? Just tap a button to flag it or if you need, freeze your business expense card.

Questions? We got you
What is a virtual Pleo card?
A Pleo virtual card is a commercial credit Mastercard® that works just like any other plastic payment card, but is accessible only electronically and can be used for online purchases. Pleo virtual card for business can be a good solution for employees who mainly make purchases online (i.e. subscriptions to online services and tools, e-commerce shops, online bookings and other online purchases) as it is safe and always accessible from your phone or computer.
Who is the issuer of the Pleo cards?
Who is behind Pleo?
"We used to spend around 10% of our time on credit card reconciliations a month, and thanks to Pleo this has been reduced to around 2%."
Charlie Maynard
Finance Manager, what3words
Highly rated in all the right places
4 star rating
4.8 star rating
4.9 star rating
Trusted by more than
40,000
companies
But that's not all...
Why Pleo
Pleo offers smart business expense cards that enable employees to buy the things they need for work, all while keeping a company's finance director in control of spending.
Simplify bookkeeping, eliminate expense reports, revolutionise your business. Power to your people.

analysis.name: Pleo
analysis.value_proposition: Smart company expense cards with automated receipt capture and real-time admin oversight to eliminate expense reports and simplify bookkeeping.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance managers and directors at small to mid-market companies (3–500 employees) seeking to automate employee spend management and accounting reconciliation.

features.name: physical company cards
features.description: Physical Mastercard prepaid cards issued to employees with individual spending limits

features.name: virtual cards
features.description: Virtual Mastercard cards for online purchases, accessible from phone or computer
features.evidence_quote: A Pleo virtual card is a commercial credit Mastercard® that works just like any other plastic payment card

features.name: temporary virtual cards
features.description: Single-use or time-limited virtual cards for one-off purchases

features.name: atm withdrawals
features.description: Cash withdrawals at ATMs using Pleo cards at no extra platform fee

features.name: cashback
features.description: Percentage cashback on eligible card spend; 0.5% on Advanced, 0.75% on Beyond

features.name: individual card limits
features.description: Per-employee spending limits set by admins on each physical or virtual card

features.name: card limits per purchase
features.description: Maximum spend cap enforced per individual transaction on a card

features.name: temporary card limits
features.description: Time-bound spending limit overrides on employee cards

features.name: advanced card controls
features.description: Merchant category restrictions and additional card usage constraints beyond basic limits

features.name: vendor locks on vendor cards
features.description: Lock a virtual card to a specific vendor to prevent off-vendor use

features.name: real-time expense overview
features.description: Live admin dashboard showing all employee transactions as they occur
features.evidence_quote: Admins get the details they need on every purchase.

features.name: expense flagging
features.description: Admins can flag suspicious or non-compliant transactions with a single tap
features.evidence_quote: Something doesn't look right? Just tap a button to flag it

features.name: card freeze
features.description: Instantly freeze an employee's expense card from the admin interface
features.evidence_quote: if you need, freeze your business expense card

features.name: spend analytics
features.description: Aggregate analytics on company spending patterns across teams and vendors

features.name: spending insights
features.description: Advanced AI-powered insights into company spend trends and anomalies

features.name: approval workflows
features.description: Configurable pre-purchase approval chains for employee spend requests

features.name: advanced approval workflows
features.description: Multi-step or conditional approval routing with additional logic and delegations

features.name: spending guidelines
features.description: Policy rules guiding employees on acceptable expense categories and amounts

features.name: guidelines assistant
features.description: AI assistant that helps configure and interpret company spending policy guidelines

features.name: budgets
features.description: Team or project-level budget envelopes with real-time tracking against actuals

features.name: automated receipt reminders
features.description: Automatic push notifications prompting employees to upload receipts after purchases

features.name: email receipt capture
features.description: Forward email receipts to Pleo (Fetch) to auto-attach them to the matching expense

features.name: ocr for receipts
features.description: Optical character recognition auto-extracts amount, date, and merchant from receipt photos

features.name: out-of-pocket expense reporting
features.description: Employees submit personal spend for reimbursement without using a Pleo card

features.name: direct reimbursements
features.description: Pleo pays employees directly for approved out-of-pocket expenses; 0.9% fee capped at $1

features.name: reimbursement-only users
features.description: Seat type for employees who only submit out-of-pocket expenses, no card issued

features.name: mileage tracking
features.description: Log and reimburse employee mileage at standard rates within the expense workflow

features.name: recurring vendor tracking
features.description: Identify and monitor recurring SaaS and vendor subscriptions detected from card data

features.name: advanced vendor insights
features.description: Detailed per-vendor analytics including trend analysis and spend breakdown

features.name: renewal management
features.description: Track upcoming vendor subscription renewals and surface proactive admin alerts

features.name: purchase orders
features.description: Create and attach purchase orders to expenses supporting formal procurement workflows

features.name: ai expense review
features.description: AI-powered automatic review and policy-compliance flagging of submitted expenses

features.name: auto-categorisation
features.description: ML-based automatic assignment of expense categories based on merchant and transaction data

features.name: custom categories and tags
features.description: User-defined expense categories and tags for flexible chart-of-accounts mapping

features.name: custom accounting exports
features.description: Export expense data in formats tailored to specific accounting systems

features.name: accounting integrations
features.description: Native sync with third-party accounting software to eliminate manual data entry

features.name: netsuite integration
features.description: Direct integration with Oracle NetSuite ERP for enterprise-grade accounting sync

features.name: hris integrations
features.description: Connect to HR information systems to sync employee records and automate onboarding

features.name: multi-entity management
features.description: Manage spending and accounting across multiple legal entities from a single Pleo account

features.name: teams management
features.description: Organize users into teams with shared budgets and reporting hierarchies

features.name: external bookkeeper access
features.description: Grant scoped access to external accountants or bookkeepers without full admin rights

features.name: transfer rules
features.description: Automated fund-transfer rules between accounts; 1 rule included on all plans

features.name: bank statement
features.description: Downloadable bank-style statement of all Pleo account activity

features.name: transaction statement
features.description: Detailed transaction-level statement export for audit and reconciliation purposes

features.name: saml sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for integration with enterprise identity providers

features.name: assisted onboarding
features.description: Hands-on guided setup support from a Pleo team member during initial account configuration

features.name: concierge support
features.description: Premium dedicated support channel for priority issue resolution

features.name: customer success manager
features.description: Dedicated CSM assigned to the account for strategic guidance and adoption planning
features.evidence_quote: Customer success manager for eligible customers

features.name: executive business review
features.description: Scheduled strategic review sessions with Pleo account leadership team

features.name: live chat support
features.description: Real-time in-app chat support available across all plans

features.name: phone support
features.description: Voice call support for eligible customers on Advanced and Beyond plans

features.name: foreign exchange fee
features.description: FX fee on international card and invoice payments; 1.99% Essential/Advanced, 1.49% Beyond

integrations: Accounting systems (unspecified — multiple via native integrations)
HRIS systems (unspecified — multiple via native integrations)
differentiators: Smart prepaid company cards that handle paperwork automatically — 'your team can buy what they need, while we sort the paperwork automatically'
Real-time per-purchase admin visibility with one-tap flagging and card freeze
Reduces credit card reconciliation from ~10% to ~2% of finance team monthly effort (customer quote)
US cards issued by Pathward N.A. (FDIC member) under Mastercard license — regulated card infrastructure
Cashback on company spend (0.5%–0.75%) built into mid and top tier plans

praised: "We used to spend around 10% of our time on credit card reconciliations a month, and thanks to Pleo this has been reduced to around 2%." — Charlie Maynard, Finance Manager, what3words

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3 users included; physical/virtual cards; accounting integrations; live chat; reimbursements; mileage; approval workflows; recurring vendor tracking

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Essential + 0.5% cashback; multi-entity management; advanced card controls; budgets; HRIS integrations; phone support

tiers.name: Beyond
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Advanced + 0.75% cashback; AI expense review; spending insights; purchase orders; assisted onboarding; concierge support; CSM

pricing.notes: Hybrid pricing: flat base covers 3 seats, then per-user increments ($11/$15/$18). No free tier. Reimbursement processing fee 0.9% capped at $1/transaction. Cashback for eligible customers only. FX fees: Essential/Advanced 1.99%, Beyond 1.49% on both card and invoice payments. SAML SSO, purchase orders, AI expense review, and CSM gated to Beyond only. No explicit enterprise/contact-sales tier listed on US pricing page.
